nodes.label: P2.1 CIFAR — layer x layer CKA (representation homogenization)
nodes.rationale: Two CKA heatmaps: WALL cell (len+sq) shows near-uniform high off-diagonal CKA (>0.8 almost everywhere) = layers redundant/homogenized; HERO cell (layer+lin) shows a sharper near-diagonal structure = layers stay more distinct from each other, yet class-separability still declines with depth (mechanism fixed, task not solved).
